quote: I am extremely satisfied with the services of CA Hetal J Shah. Their team delivers clear, transparent, and highly professional work at every stage. The firm's precise advice, timely solutions, and deep expertise make them truly dependable. Their commitment to ethics and quality sets a benchmark in the profession. Strongly recommended for all accounting, taxation, and compliance needs.
name: Meet Malvaniya

quote: Hetal has been working as my CA since at least 4–5 years now. He is doing such a great job that any problem with coordinating with banks for taking care of refunds he manages and I can do my work in the USA without worrying about anything. He is so helpful and I just rely on him to get my refund back and he does it successfully. Thanks for being a wonderful person.
name: Sonal Modi

quote: I am very happy with the professional services of CA Hetal Shah. He is highly transparent in his work and always maintains ethical practices. His guidance is clear, reliable, and has helped me a lot. I truly appreciate his dedication and the way he makes complex matters easy to understand. A trustworthy Chartered Accountant and a great professional to work with.
name: Yati Patel

quote: Hetal has done an excellent job for my services. He took care of my account issues and provided correct advice. He has a lot of latest knowledge and rules guidelines expertise. I am glad that we have seen him as our CA consultant. Thank you.
name: Bonnie Shah

quote: I am from Minnesota, USA. I have used Mr. Hetal Shah's consultant services for my Indian investment strategy, tax planning, and new rules regulation for foreign investors. The most amazing thing that impressed me was that Hetal Shah was always readily available for his services and adjusting his schedule to meet our needs due to our short period of stay at Ahmedabad. He is a very knowledgeable and subject matter expert in his area. His prompt service was very amazing and the most impressive thing was that he was very reasonable and not charging extra being we were NRI. He was a very straightforward person and liked his simple and high thinking approach. We love to go to his office again in future for other help. I strongly suggest to visit him and at least chat with him to know about NRI investments.
name: BK Shah
